fromToday: As a guide, orders placed today are currently running on a {LOW}–{HIGH} week lead time, which would put your delivery at around {DATE_LOW} to {DATE_HIGH}.
signOffWeeks: As a guide, if you are able to sign off within {N} {WEEK_WORD}, we would then be running on a {LOW}–{HIGH} week lead time, which would put your delivery at around {DATE_LOW} to {DATE_HIGH}.
signOffByDate: As a guide, if you are able to sign off by {SIGN_OFF_DATE}, we would then be running on a {LOW}–{HIGH} week lead time, which would put your delivery at around {DATE_LOW} to {DATE_HIGH}.
clientAchievable: To achieve a delivery date of around {DELIVERY_DATE}, with our current {LOW}–{HIGH} week lead time, you would need to sign off by {SIGN_OFF_BY}.
clientSignOffMissed: Unfortunately, a delivery of {DELIVERY_DATE} is no longer achievable — to have met this date, you would have needed to sign off by {SIGN_OFF_BY}. With our current {LOW}–{HIGH} week lead time, we can now deliver from around {DATE_LOW} to {DATE_HIGH}.
clientDatePassed: Unfortunately, {DELIVERY_DATE} has already passed. With our current {LOW}–{HIGH} week lead time, we can now deliver from around {DATE_LOW} to {DATE_HIGH}.
